_comment: Inline policy `KiroAnalyticsAthenaRead` attached to the portal IRSA role `portal-inventory-irsa` (arn:aws:iam::444455556666:role/portal-inventory-irsa). Grants read access to the Kiro Analytics Athena dataset in eu-central-1 (same tooling account 444455556666): run queries on the `kiro-analytics` workgroup, read the `kiro_analytics` Glue database/tables, read the source data buckets (test-kiro-logs, kiro-classified-data) and read/write the Athena results bucket. Consumed by src/lib/kiro-analytics.ts (ambient IRSA creds, no AssumeRole). Applied with: aws iam put-role-policy --role-name portal-inventory-irsa --policy-name KiroAnalyticsAthenaRead --policy-document file://ops/kiro-analytics-athena-policy.json (put-role-policy overwrites -> idempotent).
